narrative:
Precinct Brush Creek (precinct in Muskingum County) has 779 registered voters, with 59.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.4%, a clear Republican lean of 9.5 percentage points.
